headline: South Korea Has the World’s Hottest Stock Market: Why Does MSCI Still Call It ‘Emerging’?
summary: KOSPI surged 112% in 2026 yet MSCI still classes South Korea as emerging. The CEO says one currency rule is the key obstacle.
